Real Transformations

Before & After

Every project starts with a vision and ends with a transformation. Here's a look at what Vic's Tile brings to your home.

Project 01

Full Bathroom Transformation

From dated beige tile and an old tub surround to a stunning walk-in glass shower with large-format tiles, navy vanity, and matte black fixtures.

Walk-in frameless glass shower
Large-format porcelain floor & wall tile
Custom herringbone niche accent
Modern navy vanity & quartz countertop

Project 02

Kitchen Tile & Backsplash Overhaul

Dark oak cabinets and worn tile floors gave way to a bright, modern kitchen with crisp subway backsplash, large-format porcelain flooring, and a bold navy island.

Classic white subway tile backsplash
Large-format porcelain tile flooring
Navy island with waterfall quartz
Matte black hardware & fixtures

What We Do

Crafted for Every
Corner of Your Home

From a single backsplash to a full bathroom transformation — every project receives the same care and precision.

01

Bathroom Remodels

Full wet-room transformations, walk-in showers, custom floor patterns, and spa-inspired finishes. We handle every surface with precision.

02

Kitchen Tile

Backsplashes, countertops, and flooring that make your kitchen the centerpiece of the home — from classic subway to bold statement mosaics.

03

Custom Mosaics

One-of-a-kind tile art — sea turtles, palm trees, medallions, and more. If you can dream it, Vic can tile it.

About Vic

Built on Pride,
One Tile at a Time

I started Vic's Tile to help customers fulfill their dreams and make homes special — while increasing their value at the same time. Every project is personal to me. When in doubt, just tile it!
